title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos had the most views yesterday on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  MIKU KOBATO — Views: 45,740 | Yesterday: 8
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video) SAIKI vs Dany  part 2 — Views: 11,541 | Yesterday: 7
BAND-MAID / What is justice? (Official Teaser Video MISA ver.) TVアニメ「桃源暗鬼」エンディング主題歌 — Views: 36,519 | Yesterday: 6
